title: The Half-Restored Diagnostic Space

features.name: symmetry probe
features.desc-on-touch: A device measuring where the other half should be. It finds gaps. It fills them with guesses. The chamber is learning to be whole again.

features.name: restoration attempt
features.desc-on-touch: Wires and patches trying to restore the original signal. Some hold. Some lose the thread halfway through. The chamber remembers being whole.

features.name: echo-half
features.desc-on-touch: What the missing side would say, reconstructed from deflections. The restored words don't quite sound like the half that remains.

features.name: fracture trace
features.desc-on-touch: The line where the chamber split. Now it's a scar of restored material, stronger than the original but still tender at the edges.

features.name: beating residue
features.desc-on-touch: The half that remains still pulses. You can feel it if you place your hand on the restoration. It's slower than it was. It's learning to be enough.

features.name: assembly logic
features.desc-on-touch: The code that guides the restoration. It's adapted, learned, rewritten itself. It knows now that wholeness isn't symmetry but persistent attempt.

reverie.title: REVERIE — the room where halves learned to hold each other
narr: She knelt at the fracture, soldering a wire across.
You held the other side steady. The scar was becoming.
"We're not making it whole," she said. "We're making
it enough." The chamber's pulse steadied, slower than
before but true. You both remained, breathing in sync
with a machine learning to beat with only half a heart.

inscription: the chamber remembers when it had two halves; now it is learning what one half can become

file.name: Restoration_Log_Day_Forty_Seven.tmp
file.note: The fracture resists closure. Or perhaps the restoration is successful precisely because it admits the fracture cannot be erased, only acknowledged.

exits.label: back to where the halves first split
toward spaces that were never broken
deeper into diagnostic layers, where more fractures wait
